skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem:
x(x + 2) − 60 = 3x(x − 9)

What is the sum of the solutions to the given equation?
rationale: Expand both sides: x² + 2x − 60 = 3x² − 27x. Bring everything to one side: 2x² − 29x + 60 = 0. The sum of the roots of ax² + bx + c = 0 is −b/a = 29/2 = 14.5.
